channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Trump to nominate the head of Catholic advocacy group as US ambassador to the Vatican
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump says he’s nominating the president of the advocacy group CatholicVote to be the U.S. ambassador to the Vatican.
item.dc:creator: Josh Boak, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Nevada election leaders find nearly 200 cases of double votes from November
item.description: The Nevada Secretary of State’s Office is investigating 180 double votes from the 2024 general election, a report released Friday indicated.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: EPA head Regan, who championed environmental justice, to leave office Dec. 31
item.description: Michael Regan, who has led the Environmental Protection Agency throughout President Joe Biden’s four-year term, said Friday he will be leaving the agency Dec. 31, about three weeks before Biden’ leaves office.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Daly, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Democrats pledge to work through Christmas on funding to rebuff Trump’s demands
item.description: Senate Appropriations Committee Chair Patty Murray (D-Wash.) said Friday she’s ready to stay in Washington “through Christmas” to fight off President-elect Trump’s demand to strip negotiated provisions out of a bill to fund the government into 2025.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Republicans scramble for funding plan C as shutdown deadline draws near
item.description: Congress is racing toward a shutdown at the end of the day Friday, and Republicans appear no closer to finding a path forward that will keep the lights on and appease President-elect Trump.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, NewsNation

item.title: Top DOGE senator to demand lame-duck Biden agencies halt costly telework talks, citing voter mandate
item.description: Senate DOGE leader Joni Ernst of Iowa will demand federal agency heads halt negotiations on telework and taxpayer-funded union time during the lame-duck Biden administration.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pentagon warns that a government shutdown will cost troops their pay over the holidays
item.description: The Pentagon is warning that Republicans’ decision to abandon a congressional spending plan will cost more than 2 million troops their paychecks over the holidays unless some agreement is reached before Friday’s deadline to prevent a government shutdown.
item.dc:creator: Lolita C. Baldor And Tara Copp, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Fox News Politics: Musing About a Speaker Musk
item.description: Welcome to the Fox News Politics newsletter, with the latest updates on the Trump transition, exclusive interviews and more Fox News politics content
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Johnson spending deal throws Speakership into question as floor vote approaches
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson’s handling of an end-of-year spending deal is throwing his grasp on the gavel into uncertain territory ahead of a critical Jan. 3 Speaker vote, as some GOP lawmakers question their support for the Louisiana Republican. Rep. Thomas Massie (R-Ky.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, NewsNation

item.title: Spending bill contains relief for border farmers affected by lack of water
item.description: A spending bill that Congress is debating to continue funding the federal government past Friday also contains funding relief for farmers on the South Texas border who have been affected by a lack of water payments from Mexico.
item.dc:creator: Sandra Sanchez, NewsNation

item.title: House Ethics Committee secretly voted to release Matt Gaetz ethics report, source says
item.description: The House Ethics Committee has voted in secret to release the long-awaited ethics report into former Rep. Matt Gaetz.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Trump, Vance call for clean CR, debt ceiling hike, urge GOP to sink Johnson compromise
item.description: President-elect Trump and Vice President-elect Vance on Wednesday called for Republicans to approve a clean stopgap funding bill paired with a hike to the debt ceiling, saying the previous government-funding measure negotiated by Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) should be torpedoed.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, Fox 5

item.title: Social Security bill clears first hurdle in Senate
item.description: The bill, which passed with widespread support in the House, has backers lining up on both sides of the aisle.
item.dc:creator: Aris Folley, NewsNation

item.title: Paris Hilton-backed youth welfare bill passes House, heads to Biden's desk
item.description: Today is a day I will never forget. After years of sharing my story and advocating on Capitol Hill, the Stop Institutional Child Abuse Act has officially passed the U.S. Congress,” Hilton said in a post on X.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation

item.title: Senate passes defense bill that will raise troop pay and aims to counter China's power
item.description: The Senate has passed a defense bill that authorize significant pay raises for junior enlisted service members and boost overall military spending to $895 billion. It also strips coverage of transgender medical treatments for children of military members.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Mexico tightens bonds with immigrant community in US
item.description: The government of Mexico is strengthening bonds with its citizens in the United States, pledging to assist them at a time immigrant communities could be coming under increased scrutiny here.
item.dc:creator: Julian Resendiz, NewsNation

item.title: Here's what made the cut in Congress’ 1,500-page government funding deal
item.description: Congress on Tuesday rolled out its last major funding deal of the year and is expected to move quickly to try to pass it ahead of a Friday government shutdown deadline.
item.dc:creator: Aris Folley, NewsNation

item.title: Trump sues Des Moines Register, pollster
item.description: “Selzer’s polling ‘miss’ was not an astonishing coincidence — it was intentional,” the complaint states.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, Fox 5

item.title: In disputed Shakopee-area legislative race, voters share what was on uncounted ballots
item.description: While 20 ballots believed to have been discarded before being counted won’t be recovered, some voters who cast those missing ballots shared what was on them. They appear to show Rep. Brad Tabke’s narrow lead would stand up.
item.dc:creator: Dana Ferguson, MPR News

item.title: Trump tariff plan threatens to drive up gas prices
item.description: Trump said that on his first day in office, he would place 25 percent tariffs on all Canadian and Mexican goods. The two countries are the leading sources of U.S. oil imports.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Frazin, Fox 5

item.title: New York judge says Trump is not immune from hush money conviction
item.description: A spokesperson for President-elect Trump said the case should never have been brought, called for its immediate dismissal.
item.dc:creator: Ximena Bustillo, MPR News

item.title: Judge rejects Trump’s bid to toss hush money conviction
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A judge Monday refused to throw out President-elect Donald Trump’s hush money conviction because of the U.S. Supreme Court's recent ruling on presidential immunity. But the overall future of the historic case remains unclear. Manhattan Judge Juan M.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Senator Schumer urges use of ROBIN to track mystery drones
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Sen. Chuck Schumer is making a plea for federal officials to launch a declassified special drone detection system called the ROBIN – a 360-degree technology across New York, New Jersey and the metro area to track any unidentified object in the sky.
item.dc:creator: Grace Gomez, PIX 11
